ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-09-2006 IN 206, PLAINTIFFS' MTN FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D) WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 5/30/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 5/19/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. PREFERENCE CONDITIONAL UPON PATHOLOGY BEING PROVIDED BY 2/24/06. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. NON-MEDICAL DISCOVERY AND DEPOSITIONS TO BE COMPLETED BY BOTH SIDES BY 5/19/06. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT APPLIES. VERIFICATION TO RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES BY 2/24/06. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 3/30/06, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ORDER SIGNED. HON. ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERK: V.MU; REPORTER: YVONNE LEE, CSR #5616 (206)
